label: Spoiler
summary: A details-based spoiler: content hidden until deliberately opened.
era: Black-on-black spoiler text on episode-guide pages, highlight to reveal how the season ends.

classes.name: rs-spoiler
classes.role: details-based disclosure styled as the classic black bar

a11y: Native <details>/<summary>: expanded/collapsed state is announced for free, and the hidden content stays out of the accessibility tree until opened.
